general.name: Nudge Ventura Updates
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>02D65515-927E-4513-9264-DA8B17A4D52E</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>02D65515-927E-4513-9264-DA8B17A4D52E</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Nudge Ventura Updates</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Configures Nudge for Ventura updates</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Custom Settings</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>DB260813-9ADD-479F-87D0-9FAAE373A07F</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ManagedClient.preferences</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>DB260813-9ADD-479F-87D0-9FAAE373A07F</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>com.github.macadmins.Nudge</key><dict><key>Forced</key><array><dict><key>mcx_preference_settings</key><dict><key>osVersionRequirements</key><array><dict><key>requiredInstallationDate</key><string>2025-10-30T00:00:00Z</string><key>requiredMinimumOSVersion</key><string>13.7.8</string><key>targetedOSVersionsRule</key><string>13</string></dict></array><key>optionalFeatures</key><dict><key>aggressiveUserExperience</key><true/><key>aggressiveUserFullScreenExperience</key><true/><key>enforceMinorUpdates</key><true/><key>acceptableApplicationBundleIDs</key><array><string>us.zoom.xos</string></array></dict><key>userExperience</key><dict><key>allowGracePeriods</key><true/><key>allowUserQuitDeferrals</key><false/><key>allowedDeferrals</key><integer>1000000</integer><key>allowedDeferralsUntilForcedSecondaryQuitButton</key><integer>14</integer><key>approachingRefreshCycle</key><integer>6000</integer><key>approachingWindowTime</key><integer>72</integer><key>elapsedRefreshCycle</key><integer>900</integer><key>gracePeriodInstallDelay</key><integer>168</integer><key>gracePeriodLaunchDelay</key><integer>48</integer><key>gracePeriodPath</key><string>/private/var/db/.AppleSetupDone</string><key>imminentRefreshCycle</key><integer>600</integer><key>imminentWindowTime</key><integer>24</integer><key>initialRefreshCycle</key><integer>18000</integer><key>maxRandomDelayInSeconds</key><integer>1200</integer><key>noTimers</key><false/><key>nudgeRefreshCycle</key><integer>60</integer><key>randomDelay</key><true/></dict><key>userInterface</key><dict><key>iconDarkPath</key><string>/users/shared/SCS_LOGO.jpg</string><key>iconLightPath</key><string>/users/shared/SCS_LOGO.jpg</string><key>showDeferralCount</key><true/><key>simpleMode</key><false/><key>updateElements</key><array><dict><key>_language</key><string>en</string><key>subHeader</key><string>A friendly reminder from your Saks Global IT team</string></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>
